name: unified-bug-hunter
description: Scope-safe, memory-backed bug-bounty & red-team plugin for Claude Code — 89 skills, 45 commands, 31 agents, and 6 MCP servers that orchestrate real offensive tooling (subfinder/httpx/nuclei/dalfox/sqlmap/Foundry) with distilled methodology, false-positive discipline, a deterministic fail-closed scope checker, and cross-target pattern learning. Skills auto-load by topic; reports never auto-submit.
